title: groupby().sum() raises KeyError on an existing column
body:
When I run df.groupby('region').sum() on the attached dataframe it raises KeyError: 'sales', even though the 'sales' column clearly exists.

Expected: it should return the grouped totals without raising.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Load the CSV with pd.read_csv('data.csv')
2. Run df.groupby('region').sum()
3. Observe the KeyError.
